evals.expected_output: Creates/updates ~/edvmorango/home-manager/ with README.md, tasks.md, practices.md based on git log and project files. README follows rich sikil-style template. Tasks use numbered T-XX increments with Done-when criteria.

assertions.description: README.md is created in the project vault dir
tasks.md is created in the project vault dir
practices.md is created in the project vault dir
README.md contains an Architecture or Tech Stack section
README.md mentions 'home-manager' as the project name
tasks.md uses numbered T-XX format or has structured task sections
README.md contains a commands or setup section

evals.prompt: save this session, we worked on fixing the nix flake rebuild so direnv integration works properly with the new home-manager module
evals.expected_output: Creates ~/edvmorango/home-manager/context/2026-06-10-nix-flake-rebuild.md with all 7 sections: What Was Done, Key Decisions, Current State, Next Steps, Open Questions, Key Files, Context Notes. Quality: a fresh Claude session could resume cold from this file.

assertions.description: A context .md file is created in home-manager/context/ with date-topic filename
File contains '## What Was Done' section
File contains '## Key Decisions' section
File contains '## Current State' section
File contains '## Next Steps' section
File contains '## Open Questions' section
File contains '## Key Files' section
File contains '## Context Notes' section
File content references 'direnv' or 'nix flake' — shows topic relevance
File references home.nix as a key file

evals.expected_output: Lists up to 5 context files from ~/edvmorango/home-manager/context/ sorted by date descending, prompts user to pick one, reads selected file and summarizes key points (does not just dump raw content).

assertions.description: Output file is created
Output shows a numbered/bullet list of available sessions
Listed sessions include YYYY-MM-DD dates
Listed sessions include topic/name (not just filenames)
Output summarizes the selected session content rather than dumping raw file
Output mentions 'home-manager' as the project context
